---
title: "Projects & Decks"
toc: true
---

## Code

### Platelet whole-cell model

Extending the *wcEcoli* framework to model human platelet activation. Containerised simulation environment with a Dash exploration UI.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-repo-181717?logo=github)](https://github.com/stevehaigh/platelet-wcm)

### Other repos

See [all repositories on GitHub](https://github.com/stevehaigh?tab=repositories).

## Slide decks

Decks are written as Quarto Reveal.js (`.qmd`) sources and rendered to HTML, PDF, and PPTX so each can be browsed in-page or downloaded.

### The feasibility of a whole-cell model of the human platelet

Dash lab meeting, 21 May 2026 — a five-step recipe for building a calibrated platelet Ca²⁺ model on the wcEcoli framework, with some notes on AI-assisted data extraction and a typo I found in a well-cited 2008 paper.

[View slides](decks/lab-meeting-2026-05-14/index.html){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[PDF](decks/lab-meeting-2026-05-14/index.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[PPTX](decks/lab-meeting-2026-05-14.pptx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

### Academic deck template

A pared-back PPTX template for academic talks — content fills the slide, two-column layouts as the default, section breadcrumbs instead of divider slides. [Background and design notes](posts/academic-pptx-template/) in the blog.

[Download template (.pptx)](decks/academic-template.pptx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[Read the post](posts/academic-pptx-template/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

## Posters & writeups

A good place to link supplementary material, conference posters, or dissertation chapters once they're ready.
